# ML readings groups

*Original link:* http://yamlb.wordpress.com/2006/02/15/ml-readings-groups/

[Yaroslav Bulatov](http://yaroslavvb.blogspot.com) has made a list of [ML reading groups](http://yaroslavvb.blogspot.com/2005/02/machine-learning-reading-groups.html) one year ago. Some links could be broken or outdated, but most of them are still valid.
